info.name: Shopify Retrieves A List Of Webhooks

params.name: address
params.description: Retrieve webhook subscriptions that send the POST request to this URI.

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Retrieve webhook subscriptions that were created before a given date and time (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Retrieve webhook subscriptions that were created after a given date and time (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of the properties you want returned for each item in the result list. Use this parameter to restrict the returned list of items to only those properties you specify.

params.name: limit
params.description:
Maximum number of webhook subscriptions that should be returned. Setting this parameter outside the maximum range will return an error.
                  (default: 50, maximum: 250)

params.name: since_id
params.description: Restrict the returned list to webhook subscriptions whose id is greater than the specified since_id.

params.name: topic
params.description:
Show webhook subscriptions with a given topic.
For a list of valid values, refer to the topic property.>

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Retrieve webhooks that were updated before a given date and time (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Retrieve webhooks that were updated after a given date and time (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

info.name: Shopify Retrieves A List Of Orders

params.name: ids
params.description: Retrieve only orders specified by a comma-separated list of order IDs.

params.name: limit
params.description:
The maximum number of results to show on a page.
                  (default: 50, maximum: 250)

params.name: since_id
params.description: Show orders after the specified ID.

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Show orders created at or after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Show orders created at or before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Show orders last updated at or after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Show orders last updated at or before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: processed_at_min
params.description: Show orders imported at or after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: processed_at_max
params.description: Show orders imported at or before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: attribution_app_id
params.description: Show orders attributed to a certain app, specified by the app ID. Set as current to show orders for the app currently consuming the API.

params.name: status
params.description:
Filter orders by their status.
                  (default: open)
                    
                        open: Show only open orders.
                        closed: Show only closed orders.
                        cancelled: Show only canceled orders.
                        any: Show orders of any status, including archived orders.

params.name: financial_status
params.description:
Filter orders by their financial status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        authorized: Show only authorized orders
                        pending: Show only pending orders
                        paid: Show only paid orders
                        partially_paid: Show only partially paid orders
                        refunded: Show only refunded orders
                        voided: Show only voided orders
                        partially_refunded: Show only partially refunded orders
                        any: Show orders of any financial status.
                        unpaid: Show authorized and partially paid orders.

params.name: fulfillment_status
params.description:
Filter orders by their fulfillment status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        shipped: Show orders that have been shipped. Returns orders with fulfillment_status of fulfilled.
                        partial: Show partially shipped orders.
                        unshipped: Show orders that have not yet been shipped. Returns orders with fulfillment_status of null.
                        any: Show orders of any fulfillment status.
                        unfulfilled: Returns orders with fulfillment_status of null or partial.

params.name: fields
params.description: Retrieve only certain fields, specified by a comma-separated list of fields names.

info.name: Shopify Retrieves A List Of Fulfillment Orders On A Shop For A Specific App

params.name: assignment_status
params.description:
The assigment status of the fulfillment orders that should be returned:
                    
                        cancellation_requested: Fulfillment orders for which the merchant has requested cancellation of the previously accepted fulfillment request.
                        fulfillment_requested: Fulfillment orders for which the merchant has requested fulfillment.
                        fulfillment_accepted: Fulfillment orders for which the merchant's fulfillment request has been accepted. Any number of fulfillments can be created on these fulfillment orders to completely fulfill the requested items.

params.name: location_ids
params.description: The IDs of the assigned locations of the fulfillment orders that should be returned.

params.name: location_ids[]
params.description: location_ids[]

info.name: Shopify Retrieves A List Of All Articles From A Blog

params.name: blog_id
params.description: blog_id

params.name: limit
params.description:
The maximum number of results to retrieve.
                  (default: 50, maximum: 250)

params.name: since_id
params.description: Restrict results to after the specified ID.

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Show articles created after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Show articles created before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Show articles last updated after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Show articles last updated before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_min
params.description: Show articles published after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_max
params.description: Show articles published before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_status
params.description:
Retrieve results based on their published status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        published: Show only published articles.
                        unpublished: Show only unpublished articles.
                        any: Show articles of any published status.

params.name: handle
params.description: Retrieve an article with a specific handle.

params.name: tag
params.description: Filter articles with a specific tag.

params.name: author
params.description: Filter articles by article author.

params.name: fields
params.description: Show only certain fields, specified by a comma-separated list of field names.

params.name: blog_id
params.description: blog_id

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Count articles created after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Count articles created before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Count articles last updated after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Count articles last updated before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_min
params.description: Count articles published after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_max
params.description: Count articles published before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_status
params.description:
Count articles with a given published status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        published: Count only published articles.
                        unpublished: Count only unpublished articles.
                        any: Count all articles.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of tags to retrieve.

info.name: Shopify Retrieves An Order Count

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Count orders created after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Count orders created before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Count orders last updated after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Count orders last updated before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: status
params.description:
Count orders of a given status.
                  (default: open)
                    
                        open: Count open orders.
                        closed: Count closed orders.
                        any: Count orders of any status.

params.name: financial_status
params.description:
Count orders of a given financial status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        authorized: Count authorized orders.
                        pending: Count pending orders.
                        paid: Count paid orders.
                        refunded: Count refunded orders.
                        voided: Count voided orders.
                        any: Count orders of any financial status.

params.name: fulfillment_status
params.description:
Filter orders by their fulfillment status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        shipped: Show orders that have been shipped. Returns orders with fulfillment_status of fulfilled.
                        partial: Show partially shipped orders.
                        unshipped: Show orders that have not yet been shipped. Returns orders with fulfillment_status of null.
                        any: Show orders of any fulfillment status.
                        unfulfilled: Returns orders with fulfillment_status of null or partial.

info.name: Shopify Adjusts The Inventory Level Of An Inventory Item At A Single Location

params.name:
inventory_item_id
                  required
params.description: The ID of the inventory item.

params.name:
location_id
                  required
params.description: The ID of the location that the inventory level belongs to. To find the ID of the location, use the Location resource.

params.name:
available_adjustment
                  required
params.description: The amount to adjust the available inventory quantity. Send negative values to subtract from the current available quantity. For example, "available_adjustment": 2 increases the current available quantity by 2, and "available_adjustment": -3decreases the current available quantity by 3.

info.name: Shopify Sets The Inventory Level For An Inventory Item At A Location

params.name:
inventory_item_id
                  required
params.description: The ID for the inventory item.

params.name:
location_id
                  required
params.description: The ID of the location that the inventory level belongs to. To find the ID of the location, use the Location resource.

params.name:
available
                  required
params.description: Sets the available inventory quantity.

params.name: disconnect_if_necessary
params.description:
Whether inventory for any previously connected locations will be set to 0 and the locations disconnected. This property is ignored when no fulfillment service  is involved. For more information, see Inventory levels and fulfillment service locations.
                  (default: false)

params.name: relocate_if_necessary
params.description:

info.name: Comments
Shopify Retrieves A List Of Comments

params.name: limit
params.description:
The maximum number of results to retrieve.
                  (default: 50, maximum: 250)

params.name: since_id
params.description: Restrict results to after the specified ID.

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Show comments created after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Show comments created before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Show comments last updated after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Show comments last updated before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_min
params.description: Show comments published after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_max
params.description: Show comments published before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: fields
params.description: Show only certain fields, specified by a comma-separated list of field names.

params.name: published_status
params.description:
Filter results by their published status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        published: Show only published comments.
                        unpublished: Show only unpublished comments.
                        any: Show comments of any published status.

params.name: status
params.description:
Filter results by their status.
                    
                        pending: Show only pending comments.
                        published: Show only published comments.
                        unapproved: Show only unapproved comments.

params.name: article_id
params.description: article_id

params.name: blog_id
params.description: blog_id

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Count comments created before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Count comments last updated after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Count comments last updated before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_min
params.description: Count comments published after date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_at_max
params.description: Count comments published before date (format: 2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00).

params.name: published_status
params.description:
Retrieve a count of comments with a given published status.
                  (default: any)
                    
                        published: Count only published comments.
                        unpublished: Count only unpublished comments.
                        any: Count comments of any published status.

params.name: status
params.description:
Retrieve a count of comments with a given status.
                    
                        pending: Count pending comments.
                        published: Count published comments.
                        unapproved: Count unapproved comments.

info.name: Orders
Shopify For Multi-currency Orders

params.name: order_id
params.description: order_id

params.name: amount
params.description: The amount to refund. If set, Shopify attempts to void or refund the payment, depending on its status. Shopify refunds through a manual gateway in cases where the original transaction was not made in Shopify. Refunds through a manual gateway are recorded as a refund on Shopify, but the customer is not refunded.

params.name: currency
params.description: The currency of the refund that's issued when the order is canceled. Required for multi-currency orders whenever the amount property is provided.

params.name:
restock
                  deprecated
params.description:
Whether to restock refunded items back to your store's inventory.
                  (default: false)

params.name: reason
params.description:
The reason for the order cancellation. Valid values: customer, inventory, fraud, declined, and other.)
                  (default: other)

params.name: email
params.description:
Whether to send an email to the customer notifying them of the cancellation.
                  (default: false)

params.name: refund
params.description: The refund transactions to perform. Required for some more complex refund situations. For more information, see the Refund API.

info.name: Shopify For Multi-currency Orders

params.name: order_id
params.description: order_id

params.name:
restock
                  deprecated
params.description: Whether to add the line items back to the store inventory. Use restock_type for refund line items instead.

params.name: notify
params.description: Whether to send a refund notification to the customer.

params.name: note
params.description: An optional note attached to a refund.

params.name: discrepancy_reason
params.description: An optional comment that explains a discrepancy between calculated and actual refund amounts. Used to populate the reason property of the resulting order adjustment object attached to the refund. Valid values: restock, damage, customer, and other.

params.name: shipping
params.description:
Specify how much shipping to refund. It has the following properties:
                    
                        full_refund: Whether to refund all remaining shipping.
                        amount: Set a specific amount to refund for shipping. Takes precedence over full_refund.

params.name: refund_line_items
params.description:
A list of line item IDs, quantities to refund, and restock instructions. Each entry has the following properties:
                    
                        line_item_id: The ID of a line item to refund.
                        quantity: The quantity to refund.
                        restock_type:           How this refund line item affects inventory levels. Valid values:
          
            no_restock: Refunding these items won't affect inventory.
            cancel: The items have not yet been fulfilled.
            The canceled quantity will be added back to the available count.
            The number of fulfillable units for this line item will decrease.
            return: The items were already delivered but will be returned to the merchant.
            The returned quantity will be added back to the available count. The number of fulfillable units for this
            line item will remain unchanged.
          

                        location_id:           The ID of the location where the items should be
          restocked. This is required when the value of restock_type is return or cancel.
          If the item is not already stocked at the location, then
          the item is connected to the location. An error is returned when the item is connected to
          a 
          fulfillment service location and a different location is provided.

params.name: transactions
params.description:
A list of transactions
          to process as refunds.

params.name: currency
params.description: The three-letter code (ISO 4217 format) for the currency used for the refund.

info.name: Shopify For Multi-currency Orders

params.name: order_id
params.description: order_id

params.name: shipping
params.description:
Specify how much shipping to refund. It has the following properties:
                    
                        full_refund: Whether to refund all remaining shipping.
                        amount: Set a specific amount to refund for shipping. Takes precedence over full_refund.

params.name: refund_line_items
params.description:
A list of line item IDs, quantities to refund, and restock instructions. Each entry has the following properties:
                    
                        line_item_id: The ID of a line item to refund.
                        quantity: The quantity to refund.
                        restock_type:           How this refund line item affects inventory levels. Valid values:
          
            no_restock: Refunding these items won't affect inventory.
            cancel: The items have not yet been fulfilled. The canceled quantity will be added
            back to the available count. The number of fulfillable units for this line item will decrease.
            return: The items were already delivered but will be returned to the merchant.
            The returned quantity will be added back to the available count.
            The number of fulfillable units for this line item will remain unchanged.
          

                        location_id:           The ID of the location
          where the items should be restocked. If location_id is not provided and the value of
          restock_type is return or cancel, then the endpoint returns a suitable
          location ID.

                        already_stocked:           Whether the item is already stocked at
          the location. If this is false, then creating the refund will connect the item to the location and start
          stocking it there.

params.name: currency
params.description:
The three-letter code (ISO 4217 format) for the
          currency used for the refund. Note: Required whenever the shipping amount property is provided.

            line item will remain unchanged.
          

                        location_id:           The ID of the location where the items should be
          restocked. This is required when the value of restock_type is return or cancel.
          If the item is not already stocked at the location, then
          the item is connected to the location. An error is returned when the item is connected to
          a 
          fulfillment service location and a different location is provided.
